title: Implement cache adapter system with Redis and memory backends
description: Add Redis cache adapter in src/cache/redisAdapter.ts, in-memory cache adapter with TTL support in src/cache/memoryAdapter.ts, and cache manager in src/cache/cacheManager.ts that selects adapter based on configuration. The cache manager should support both Redis and in-memory backends with configurable adapter selection.
existing_patterns: src/utils/cache.ts - existing in-memory LRU cache with TTL support and stats tracking
src/utils/di-container.ts - token-based dependency injection with singleton/transient lifecycles
src/utils/result.ts - Result<T, E> discriminated union for explicit error handling
questions: Which adapter should be the default when no environment is specified - memory or Redis?
Should the cache manager automatically use Redis when REDIS_URL is present in environment, or require explicit configuration?
Is there an existing Redis client library in the project that the adapter should use, or should one be added as a dependency?
